# Freight Bridge Cleanup Services - Iowa City
> Post-Construction Cleanup for Iowa City Data Centers

## NAP
- Name: Freight Bridge Cleanup Services - Iowa City
- Address: Iowa City, Iowa City, IA 52245
- Phone: (641) 451-3132
- Email: cleanup@freightbridgellc.com

## Hours
Mon-Fri 6AM-6PM | Sat by appointment | Sun Closed

## Domain
https://freightbridgecleanup-iowacity.com

## Description
Freight Bridge Cleanup Services handles post-construction cleanup for data center projects in the Iowa City corridor. After the trades wrap up, we come in with our box truck, haul off the construction debris, and sweep out the building so it's ready for commissioning. A division of Freight Bridge LLC.

## Owner
Mohamed Soliman

## Payment Accepted
Wire Transfer, ACH, Invoice (Net 30)

## Year Established
2010
